query_name: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "__count" FROM "shop_product" INNER JOIN "shop_category" ON ("shop_product"."category_id" = "shop_category"."id") WHERE ("shop_product"."is_active" AND "shop_category"."slug" = $1 AND "shop_product"."created_at" >= $2::ti
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "__count" FROM "shop_product" WHERE ("shop_product"."is_active" AND "shop_product"."created_at" >= $1::timestamptz)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "__count" FROM "shop_product" WHERE ("shop_product"."is_active" AND (UPPER("shop_product"."name"::text) LIKE UPPER($1) OR UPPER("shop_product"."description"::text) LIKE UPPER($2)))
